name: nickel-build-phased-execution
goal: Execute build-hardening work in strict phase order with mandatory verification gates.

phases.name: intake-and-scope
phases.verification_gate: Problem statement, constraints, and acceptance criteria are documented and approved.

phases.name: repo-baseline
phases.verification_gate: Baseline lint/build/test state is captured before code changes.

phases.name: target-discovery
phases.verification_gate: All target files/components are mapped with minimal-change scope.

phases.name: reference-research
phases.verification_gate: Relevant Cromite/Bromite reference patches are fetched and summarized via Firecrawl.

phases.name: api-name-verification
phases.verification_gate: All Chromium C++ API names and GN args to be used are verified with Context7.

phases.name: implementation-plan
phases.verification_gate: Sequential Thinking plan is completed with risk and rollback notes.

phases.name: surgical-code-changes
phases.verification_gate: Minimal and focused code changes are applied to required files only.

phases.name: focused-tests
phases.verification_gate: Targeted tests for changed behavior are added/updated where infrastructure exists.

phases.name: ui-verification
phases.verification_gate: Playwright-based UI verification passes and screenshots are captured for UI impact.

phases.name: security-review
phases.verification_gate: Security review confirms no new vulnerabilities in changed code paths.

phases.name: regression-check
phases.verification_gate: No regressions detected in existing behavior impacted by the change.

phases.name: pr-readiness
phases.verification_gate: Diff is minimal, rationale is documented, and commits are clean.

phases.name: final-validation-and-handoff
phases.verification_gate: All verification gates for phases 0-12 have passed and the final phase-13 handoff report is complete.
